title: Cynomarathrum parryi
taxonomy: Cynomarathrum parryi is classified within the plant family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. This family comprises a diverse group of plants, including carrots, parsley, and dill. The genus Cynomarathrum is a small group of plants that are native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Within the Apiaceae family, Cynomarathrum parryi is a specific species that is often found growing in dry, rocky areas. This plant is also known as Parry's cinquefoil or Parry's licorice root.
